aeo_readiness.summary: The business has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and localized content, but lacks depth in content optimization, reviews, and structured data implementation.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build a strong Google Business Profile with positive reviews.
Optimize website content with location-specific keywords and detailed service descriptions.
Enhance the website's internal linking structure to improve navigation and SEO.

gbp_analysis.found: The business has a Google Business Profile (GBP) but lacks reviews and detailed information.
gbp_analysis.summary: The GBP is incomplete and underutilized, with no reviews, which significantly impacts local search visibility and customer trust.
critical_issues: No customer reviews, which are crucial for local SEO and trust-building.
Incomplete business information, such as missing service areas or specific service details.
Lack of regular updates or posts to engage with potential customers.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information on its website but lacks citations on major directories and local listings.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Apple Maps.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms, including social media and local directories.
Monitor and update citations regularly to maintain accuracy.

schema_gaps: Service schema for detailed service descriptions and pricing.
Review schema to highlight customer testimonials and ratings.
Local business schema with additional details such as opening hours and payment methods.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and detailed content optimization.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for specific HVAC or plumbing services in Georgetown, TX.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing existing content with location-specific keywords.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, informative content such as blog posts or guides on common HVAC and plumbing issues to establish the business as a local authority.
